title: Preorder Traversal

class Solution:

	def preorderTraversal(self, A):

hints: Preorder traversal visits nodes in the order: root, left, right.
Use recursion to traverse the tree.
For each node, first add its value to the result, then recursively traverse left subtree, then right subtree.
Handle the base case when the node is null.
You can also use an iterative approach with a stack.
